subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1919-03-09
subcodes.first_line: Today is a most blessed Day, sanctified and auspicious; it is the dawning of the effulgent rays of the Morn of Guidance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: امروز روز بسیار مبارکیست متبرک و متیمن است طلوع انوار صبح هدی است
subcodes.subjects: @interpretation of words and passages in scripture, @apocalyptic imagery, @rejection by the people of the Bayan, @prophecy and fulfillment, @Qur'an and Hadith quotation and interpretation, @the Bab; the Primal Point; station and claims of the Bab
